files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "clickhouse-1118-feature-request-explain-output",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "clickhouse: feature request: EXPLAIN output",
+    "description": "feature request: EXPLAIN output. Requested by 40+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current ClickHouse setup",
+        "description": "Verify your ClickHouse version:\n```bash\nclickhouse-client --version\n```\nThe EXPLAIN statement requires ClickHouse 20.6+."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review EXPLAIN output",
+        "description": "ClickHouse added the `EXPLAIN` statement for query plan inspection:\n- `EXPLAIN` / `EXPLAIN PLAN` - Logical query plan\n- `EXPLAIN PIPELINE` - Execution pipeline\n- `EXPLAIN AST` - Abstract syntax tree\n- `EXPLAIN SYNTAX` - Optimized query after rewrites"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Use EXPLAIN to analyze queries",
+        "description": "Analyze a query plan:\n```sql\nEXPLAIN SELECT count() FROM system.numbers WHERE number > 100;\n\nEXPLAIN actions=1 SELECT count() FROM system.numbers WHERE number > 100;\n\nEXPLAIN PIPELINE SELECT count() FROM system.numbers WHERE number > 100;\n\nEXPLAIN SYNTAX SELECT * FROM system.numbers WHERE number = 1 OR number = 2;\n```\n\nEXPLAIN PLAN settings: `header` (0/1), `description` (0/1), `actions` (0/1)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify EXPLAIN works",
+        "description": "Run EXPLAIN on a query:\n```sql\nEXPLAIN SELECT * FROM system.one;\n```\nYou should see the execution plan with steps like ReadFromStorage, Expression, etc."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "ClickHouse implemented the EXPLAIN statement supporting EXPLAIN PLAN, EXPLAIN PIPELINE, EXPLAIN AST, and EXPLAIN SYNTAX modes.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "clickhouse",
+      "community",
+      "analytics-db",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+    },

+  },

+    ],

+  },
